PROP-baseauction-inv-052.text: Bid assetOutAmount must never be zero for a valid bid (bidder always receives something).
PROP-baseauction-inv-052.assertion: forall valid bid: _getAssetOutAmount > 0 when amount > 0 and prices > 0

locations.note: uses mulDivUp at line 799 — could still return 0 if assetOutUsdPrice is very large relative to auctionUsdValue
calls _getAssetOutAmount at line 442; no zero-check on the result before safeTransferFrom
